findings.title: nomic-ai/gpt4all
findings.description: GPT4All: Run Local LLMs on Any Device. Open-source and available for commercial use.

findings.title: oobabooga/text-generation-webui
findings.description: The original local LLM interface. Text, vision, tool-calling, training, and more. 100% offline.

findings.title: mudler/LocalAI
findings.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

findings.title: chatchat-space/Langchain-Chatchat
findings.description: Langchain-Chatchat（原Langchain-ChatGLM）基于 Langchain 与 ChatGLM, Qwen 与 Llama 等语言模型的 RAG 与 Agent 应用 | Langchain-Chatchat (formerly langchain-ChatGLM), local knowledge based LLM (like ChatGLM, Qwen and Llama) RAG and Agent app with langchain

findings.title: khoj-ai/khoj
findings.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

findings.title: Fosowl/agenticSeek
findings.description: Fully Local Manus AI. No APIs, No $200 monthly bills. Enjoy an autonomous agent that thinks, browses the web, and code for the sole cost of electricity. 🔔 Official updates only via twitter @Martin993886460 (Beware of fake account)

findings.title: iOfficeAI/AionUi
findings.description: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

findings.title: dyad-sh/dyad
findings.description: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

findings.title: cocktailpeanut/dalai
findings.description: The simplest way to run LLaMA on your local machine

findings.title: h2oai/h2ogpt
findings.description: Private chat with local GPT with document, images, video, etc. 100% private, Apache 2.0. Supports oLLaMa, Mixtral, llama.cpp, and more. Demo: https://gpt.h2o.ai/ https://gpt-docs.h2o.ai/

findings.title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
findings.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted,  Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

findings.title: Tiiny-AI/PowerInfer
findings.description: High-speed Large Language Model Serving for Local Deployment

findings.title: intel/ipex-llm
findings.description: Accelerate local LLM inference and finetuning (LLaMA, Mistral, ChatGLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, Gemma, Phi, MiniCPM, Qwen-VL, MiniCPM-V, etc.) on Intel XPU (e.g., local PC with iGPU and NPU, discrete GPU such as Arc, Flex and Max); seamlessly integrate with llama.cpp, Ollama, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vLLM, DeepSpeed, Axolotl, etc.

findings.title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
findings.description: Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

findings.title: di-sukharev/opencommit
findings.description: top #1 and most feature rich GPT wrapper for git — generate commit messages with an LLM in 1 sec — works with Claude, GPT and every other provider, supports local Ollama models too

findings.title: JerryZLiu/Dayflow
findings.description: The automatic work journal. Privately turns your screen into a timeline of what you actually accomplished. Open-source and local-first.

findings.title: gptme/gptme
findings.description: Your agent in your terminal, equipped with local tools: writes code, uses the terminal, browses the web. Make your own persistent autonomous agent on top!

findings.title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
findings.description: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

findings.title: CaviraOSS/OpenMemory
findings.description: Local persistent memory store for LLM applications including claude desktop, github copilot, codex, antigravity, etc.

findings.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
findings.description: Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.
